text: Here, bathed in cool artificial light, my senses are heightened. The vacant corridor—almost sterile, yet vaguely disordered with stray objects—evokes a sense of waiting or transition. Moving deeper, the second scene consoles me with bursts of color and curated knowledge: a space dedicated to research and innovation. Screens softly glow with information, beckoning curiosity. I feel like an observer at the threshold between isolation and creativity, suspended between silence and discovery. There is both unease and excitement—a philosophical tension between emptiness and the promise of meaning.
